Our Products

Everything You Need For Solar

We supply Tier-1 certified products from the world's top solar brands — tested, warranted, and installed by professionals.

Solar Panels

Longi, Canadian Solar, JA Solar, Jinko — Tier-1 High-Efficiency Panels

Hybrid Inverters

Solis, Inverex, Goodwe, Maxpower — Grid + Battery For Uninterrupted Power

Lithium Batteries

6,000–8,000 Cycles, 5–7 Year Replacement Warranty For Backup

Complete Wiring

AC/DC Breaker Box, Circuit Protection, Conduit Work To Safety Standards

On-Grid Inverters

Knox, Solis, Growatt, Huawei, Sofar — 5-Year Local Replacement Warranty

Mounting Structures

Elevated, L2, L3 — Custom For Your Roof Type And Load Requirements
